name: vehicles_ride
checklist: doc 13 M4 — a PASSENGER/second-client set: spawns at the same inland spot as the 'vehicles' driver, next to their buggy, but spawns NO vehicle of its own.
Board the passenger seat of the driver's buggy and ride; your drive input must be ignored (only the driver steers).
Also used by the vehicles-probe verify pass to observe a rehydrated buggy without provisioning a second one.
